case_title: FARRALES,CLARITA "CLAIRE" R. VS TECSON,NORMA B.-FIL.AM.EMPL.TRAINING CENTER RM.319 et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,527.02 FILED BY FARRALES,CLARITA "CLAIRE" R. AS TO DEFENDANT TECSON,NORMA B.-FIL.AM.EMPL.TRAINING CENTER RM.319 FILIPINO AMERICAN EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CTR RM 319 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT.REC.TO NORMA B. TECSON RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARRALES,CLARITA "CLAIRE" R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILIPINO AMERICAN EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CTR RM 319 $2,527.02 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,547.02, PLFT TO RETURN PETTY CASH RECEIPTS BY 7/31/93 DEF NORMA B. TECSON ACTING AS EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE FILIPINO AMERICAN EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CENTER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE
MOTION ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT OF 7/26/93. FILED BY DEFENDANT FILIPINO AMERICAN EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CTR RM 319 HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT OF 7/26/93. CONTINUED FROM SEP-20-1993 TO SEP-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT OF 7/26/93. CONTINUED FROM SEP-29-1993 TO OCT-04-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
BEFORE JUDGE ORR AT 8:00 AM, OCT. 4, 1993. DEFT TO BE SUED UNDER NAME OF"FILIPINO AMERICAN COUNCIL OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. & FILIPINO AMERICAN
EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CENTER" NOTE:FIL-AM COUNCIL OF SF (THRU PRES STAN ANIMO) WIAVED IRREGULARITIES & NOTICE OF TRIAL ON OCT. 4, 1993.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT OF 7/26/93. OF OCT-04-1993, GRANTED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TECSON,NORMA B.-FIL.AM.EMPL.TRAINING CENTER RM.319 FILIPINO AMERICAN EMPLOYMENT & TRAINING CTR RM 319
